channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Volkswagen ID. Cross : le SUV électrique à 28 000 € qui veut faire trembler la Renault 4 E-Tech
item.description: Volkswagen vient de dévoiler le tarif de sa future voiture électrique, l'ID. Cross, version SUV de l'ID. Polo électrique. Cette concurrente de la Renault 4 E-Tech dévoile également sa fiche technique, et les premiers journalistes ont pu la conduire, camouflée. Voici ce qu'ils en ont pensé.

item.title: JBL's Best Wireless Headphones Are $170 Off at Walmart
item.description: The Tour One M3 headphones offer flagship performance at midrange pricing, as long as color is negotiable for you.

item.title: Encyclopedia Britannica is suing OpenAI for allegedly ‘memorizing’ its content with ChatGPT
item.description: On Friday, Encyclopedia Britannica and dictionary publisher Merriam-Webster filed a lawsuit against OpenAI alleging that it used their copyrighted content to train its AI, then generated responses that were "substantially similar" to their content, as previously reported by Reuters. According to Britannica, OpenAI repeatedly copied its content without permission, stating, "GPT-4 itself has 'memorized' much […]...

item.title: How to watch Mr Nobody Against Putin on BBC iPlayer (it's FREE)
item.description: A Russian teach takes on Vladimir Putin in this Oscar-winning doc — here’s how to watch Mr Nobody Against Putin online and for free from any country as the film wows movie and politics fans.

item.title: Amazon’s Fire TV Stick 4K Max and 4K Plus sticks are up to 50 percent off
item.description: Since Amazon rolled out its redesigned Fire TV OS, Amazon’s latest streaming sticks are even better than ever. And right now, both the Fire TV Stick 4K Max and Fire TV Stick 4K Plus are back at their best prices yet during Amazon’s early Big Spring Sale event. You can buy the Fire TV Stick […]

item.title: 'So much of the work is going to be done by agents': ServiceNow CEO says graduate unemployment could reach 30% because of AI agents
item.description: 90% of human customer service agent use cases can be replaced by AI, ServiceNow CEO Bill McDermott explains.

item.title: What is the release date for Invincible season 4 episodes 1 to 3 on Prime Video?
item.description: Invincible season 4 will make its Prime Video bow with three episodes — here's when you'll be able to stream them.

item.title: Last One Laughing UK season 2 returning to Prime Video is the only thing getting me through the week — but I can already guess who cracks first in episode 1
item.description: Prime Video’s funniest reality show, Last One Laughing season 2, drops its first 3 episodes this week — and I know exactly who will be eliminated first.

item.title: OnePlus 15R : ce champion de l’autonomie voit son prix s’alléger de 21 % en ce dernier jour des ventes flash d’Amazon
item.description: Autonomie remarquable, bonnes performances, étanchéité totale... Le OnePlus 15R a beau être une version abordable du OnePlus 15, il cumule de nombreux atouts. En cette fin de ventes flash de printemps, Amazon le propose d'ailleurs à 571,91 euros au lieu de 729 euros.

item.title: Encyclopedia Britannica sues OpenAI for copyright and trademark infringement
item.description: OpenAI has been hit with another lawsuit. This time, Encyclopedia Britannica took legal action against OpenAI, accusing the company of copyright and trademark infringements, as first reported by Reuters. More specifically, Britannica alleged that OpenAI illegally used its "copyrighted content at a massive scale" when training its AI models. Not just with training, the encyclopedia company claimed that ChatGPT's responses to user queries sometimes contain "full or partial verbatim reproductions of [Britannica's] copyright articles." Along with claims of copyright violations, Britannica argued t...

item.title: This Fungus Can Make Water Freeze
item.description: Fungi may be the real-life superheroes of the natural world.

item.title: Les 10 smartphones les plus populaires de la semaine sur Frandroid : Nothing attire la curiosité, Samsung reste le maître
item.description: Pour notre top 10 des smartphones les plus populaires de la semaine sur Frandroid, une vraie concurrence féroce se lance sur Android. Samsung, Nothing, Xiaomi et OnePlus se livrent bataille parmi les appareils les plus populaires sur Frandroid.

item.title: Workers Most At-Risk of Being Hit by AI Layoffs Are Well-Positioned to Adapt, Study Finds
item.description: A study finds that millions of workers in AI-exposed jobs could adapt, but about 6 million may struggle to find new work.

item.title: Hunting for a new PC? You might need to be quick — global shipments set to plummet in 2026 as memory and storage shortages bite
item.description: Global PC shipments may decline in 2026 as memory and storage shortages drive costs higher and force vendors to adjust pricing.

item.title: This 'exceptional' 5G mobile router deal is your last chance to save on Netgear's fast business travel essential in Amazon's Spring Sale
item.description: The M3 is a must-have for business professionals - and its cheaper at the Amazon Spring Sale now.

item.title: Terrain complexe ou grand jardin ? Le robot tondeuse Dreame A3 AWD Pro 3500 n’a peur de rien [Sponso]
item.description: Avec le A3 AWD Pro 3500, Dreame a mis toute son expertise au service d’un nouveau produit : concevoir un robot tondeuse capable de surmonter les défis posés par toutes les typologies de jardins.

item.title: It ain't heavy, but Sony's new budget Bluetooth turntable is still a winner eight days a week
item.description: Sony’s PS-LX310BT has been a roaring success — but time waits for no Bluetooth turntable, so more than six years since the 310 launched it’s finally being replaced. Which means this PS-LX5BT has some big and successful shoes to fill…

item.title: DualSense Edge : la manette ultime pour jouer sur PS5 profite du dernier jour des ventes flash d’Amazon pour passer sous les 200 €
item.description: La manette DualSense Edge est la manette « Pro » idéale pour enchaîner les parties sur PS5 dans les meilleures conditions. En ce dernier jour des ventes flash de printemps d'Amazon, vous la trouverez à 186,96 euros au lieu de 219,99 euros.

item.title: Ends tonight! I've found the 40+ best deals remaining in Amazon's Spring Sale — TVs, appliances, smart home, and more
item.description: Amazon's huge Spring sale is finally drawing to a close - here are the best deals to shop before it ends.

item.title: There’s a Good Reason the MacBook Neo Is Apple’s Most Repairable Laptop
item.description: Apple's $600 MacBook Neo finally eschews glue in favor of good old screws.

item.title: Liquid Glass n’est pas près de disparaître chez Apple
item.description: Liquid Glass est bien parti pour rester. Le « langage de design » inauguré par Apple dans tous ses systèmes d'exploitation l'an dernier ne devrait évoluer que par petites touches avec iOS 27 et consorts.

item.title: Adobe reaches $150m settlement on US lawsuit over alleged hidden subscription fees, cancellation charges
item.description: Adobe instructed by the DOJ to pay $75 million in civil penalties, and a further $75 million in free services to customers.

item.title: 'I trust James Gunn' or 'repeating the DCEU's mistakes'?: Booster Gold cancelation rumor leaves DC fans divided over the direction of the rebooted DCU
item.description: Amid speculation over the departure of Booster Gold's showrunner, DC fans wonder what it could mean for the future of other DCU projects.

item.title: The 9 best sleep tracking gadgets — monitor your nighttime habits from your finger, wrist, ears, or mattress
item.description: Wearable and non-wearable sleep trackers that we've tried and tested, and come with TechRadar's stamp of approval.

item.title: March Madness 2026 — Stream it *FREE* with these trial offers
item.description: Here's a quick guide on how you can stream March Madness 2026 for free using trial offers from YouTube TV, Hulu+Live TV, Fubo TV, DirecTV Stream and more.

item.title: A city in Southern Spain holds an ancient secret to fighting extreme heat
item.description: Seville is experimenting with underground aqueduct networks to beat the heat, building upon an ancient Middle Eastern urban cooling system. A few meters below the former site of Seville’s 1992 World Expo, a promising climate experiment blending ancient technology and modern science is underway.

item.title: Paradise Season 2: What is the message for Jane?
item.description: "Paradise" Season 2 may have just confirmed it's doing time travel thanks to a scene involving Jane's birth. What's going on?

item.title: Maul Wants the Revenge of a Sith in the New ‘Shadow Lord’ Trailer
item.description: The former apprentice begins his criminal empire in earnest in the new 'Star Wars' animated series, coming April 6.

item.title: I tried KitchenAid's new super-easy pasta roller, and making flavored spaghetti is my new favorite hobby
item.description: Just screw this all-purpose attachment onto your stand mixer and start making tagliatelle, spaghetti, linguine and much more.

item.title: Antonio Gracias says he’s longing for ‘proentropic’ startups — those that are built to survive chaos
item.description: Antonio Gracias talks at the Upfront Summit in LA about the future of technology.

item.title: Shopify is preparing for AI shopping agents to change everything, exec says
item.description: Shopify is preparing for an ecommerce transformation via AI shopping agents, says president Harley Finklestein.

item.title: With Midterms Looming, Trump’s Pick for Surgeon General Suddenly Thinks Measles Vaccines Are a Good Idea
item.description: At her nomination hearing last month, Casey Means avoided directly endorsing vaccines for measles and other preventable diseases.

item.title: When is Amazons Spring Sale in 2026? Amazon just announced official dates.
item.description: Amazon is having its Spring Sale in the last week of March. Expect fitness, bedding, and cleaning deals that take up to 40% off.

item.title: Amazon casse encore plus les prix pour le dernier jour de ses ventes flash de printemps : voici les meilleures offres en DIRECT
item.description: Comme chaque année, Amazon fête l'arrivée du printemps avec des ventes flash étalées sur plusieurs jours, l'occasion pour les petits férus de Tech que nous sommes de dénicher les meilleurs bons plans sur les smartphones, tablettes, PC portables... Voici nos recommandations !

item.title: « C’est ma meilleure amie » : il utilise l’IA pour défier la mort de sa chienne
item.description: Regardez bien l'histoire de Rosie. Condamnée par un cancer agressif, cette chienne a vu sa tumeur fondre de moitié après un traitement conçu... par son maître et une IA. En utilisant ChatGPT et AlphaFold, Paul Conyngham a transformé des données génomiques brutes en un vaccin sur mesure.

item.title: PS5 Pro : voici comment Sony débloque enfin la puissance promise grâce au PSSR 2.0
item.description: PlayStation vient de déployer la mise à jour tant attendue pour sa technologie de mise à l'échelle par IA, le PSSR. De nombreux jeux sur PS5 Pro vont ainsi profiter d'une meilleure qualité d'image et de meilleures performances.

item.title: Florida man uses ChatGPT to sell his home. This is a real headline.
item.description: Man says he used ChatGPT as a realtor and successfully sold his home in a week. Why you might want to wait before asking chatbots for real estate help.

item.title: John Oliver spends 28 minutes tearing into JD Vance
item.description: John Oliver has taken a deep dive into JD Vance on "Last Week Tonight".

item.title: Why AI must shrink to reach its enterprise potential
item.description: Rising power demands threaten AI progress, driving the need for smarter, leaner models.

item.title: Theres already lots of Apple deals to shop ahead of the Amazon Big Spring Sale
item.description: Shop all the best Apple deals ahead of the Amazon Big Spring Sale, including price drops on AirPods Pro 3 and the M4 iPad Air.

item.title: 2TB SSD deal: Best Buy has discounted our favorite rugged portable SSD - but you can save even more at Amazon
item.description: The SanDisk Extreme 2TB SSD boasts a durable IP65 rating and excellent benchmark numbers in our tests.

item.title: iOS 27 update: Liquid Glass haters should prepare for disappointment
item.description: All signs point to the controversial Liquid Glass design language sticking around in iOS 27.

item.title: Watch a Clip of ‘Doctor Who’ That’s Not Been Seen for Over 60 Years
item.description: The BBC's restoration of two episodes of 'The Daleks' Master Plan', unseen since their first broadcast in 1965, will stream in the UK next month.

item.title: Weather Across the US Is Going Absolutely Berserk This Week
item.description: Blizzards and heatwaves and thunderstorms, oh my!

item.title: Amazon’s best Echo speakers and screens just got their biggest discounts
item.description: While Amazon’s previous lineup of Echo speakers and smart displays was boring, frankly, its late 2025 hardware refresh brought better hardware, improved performance, and Alexa Plus to several models. If you feel like your room(s) could benefit from speakers to deliver tunes, audiobooks, or podcasts to more corners of your home, or screens to show […]...

item.title: Amazon en PLS : le géant chinois JD.com se lance en France
item.description: Amazon a du souci à se faire. Après Shein et Temu qui ont trouvé leur place sur le marché européen du commerce en ligne, une autre plateforme chinoise s'attaque au vieux continent : le mastodonte JD.com a en effet lancé l'offensive avec Joybuy en France et dans quelques autres pays européens.

item.title: La PS5 Pro revient en promo dans ce pack avec le lecteur blu-ray 4K et Clair Obscur : Expédition 33, le GOTY 2025
item.description: Joybuy fait décidément des offres très intéressantes en proposant cette fois la PS5 Pro avec lecteur 4K et une copie de Clair Obscur pour 799,99 euros, soit le prix de la console seule.

item.title: Tech leaders need a cloud reality check before it’s too late
item.description: There is a widening gap between technology ambition and what underlying infrastructure can realistically support.

item.title: OpenAI's adult mode reportedly won't generate pornographic audio, images or video
item.description: OpenAI's forthcoming "adult mode" will allow users to engage in lewd conversations with ChatGPT, but not use the chatbot to generate explicit images, audio or video. In response to reporting from The Wall Street Journal, an OpenAI spokesperson characterized the upcoming release as capable of producing smut rather than pornography. OpenAI CEO Sam Altman first floated the idea of allowing people to use ChatGPT for erotica last October, saying the company wanted to "treat adult users like adults." OpenAI originally planned to release adult mode at the start of 2026. Since then, the company has pu...

item.title: The best early robot vacuum deals to shop ahead of Amazons Big Spring Sale
item.description: Shop the best early robot vacuum deals from top brands during Amazon's 2026 Big Spring Sale.
